title: Debug a chart by rendering and isolating the template
description: Use helm template --debug and --show-only to see the exact rendered YAML and pinpoint a nil value or indentation bug before installing.
body: Use when an install fails or a manifest renders wrong. Do not install repeatedly against the cluster to debug. Actions: run helm template --debug to render locally with stack traces, use --show-only templates/<file>.yaml to isolate one manifest, pass the failing -f values to reproduce, and look for nil pointer (missing key) or indentation (missing nindent/toYaml) issues. Validation signals include the render succeeding locally with the expected YAML and the previously failing key now populated. Risk boundary: none for local render; applying to production still requires the normal upgrade gate.
